growthexperiments-desc: Kordhintani waxay ka kooban tahay tijaabooyin ay sameeyeen kooxda Growth.
growthexperiments-config-validator-datat: $1 waxaa la filayay inuu noqdo $2, laakiin waa $3
growthexperiments-config-validator-conte: Iswaafaqla’aan nooca nuxurka ah: Faylka qaabaynta GrowthExperiments waa inuu lahaadaa nooca nuxurka JSON, balse $1 ayaa la helay
growthexperiments-config-validator-newco: Aqoonsiga maamulaha nooca hawsha waa khalad: $1 ma aha qiime sax ah
growthexperiments-config-validator-array: $1 wuxuu leeyahay walxo aad u badan (ugu badnaan $2 ayaa la oggol yahay)
communityconfiguration-communityupdates-: La wadaag wararka muhiimka ah ee bulshada, ololayaasha, dhacdooyinka, ama Mashaariicda Wiki bogga hore ee isticmaalayaasha cusub.

Qaybtan [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Growth/Community_Updates|Cusboonaysiinta Bulshada]] waxaa lagu soo bandhigi doonaa bogga hore, waana in loo adeegsadaa wadaagista wararka muhiimka ah ee bulshada, ololayaasha, dhacdooyinka, ama WikiProjects. Mudnaanta waa in la siiyaa cusboonaysiinta taageeraysa talada istaraatiijiyadda dhaqdhaqaaqa ee [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Movement_Strategy/Recommendations/Identify_Topics_for_Impact#Changes_and_Actions “Mowduucyada Saameynta Leh”].
Cinwaan gaaban oo sida ugu wanaagsan u metelaya ololaha, mashruuca, dhacdada, ama hindisaha bulshada ee la muujinayo.
Farriin xog warran oo gaaban oo saaxiibtinimo leh si ay u dhaliso xiisaha.
Tirada ugu yar ee tafatirrada uu isticmaaluhu sameeyay si loo tuso boodhkan
Ka raadi sawir Wikimedia Commons adigoo qoraya magaciisa kana dooranaya liiska. Si uu si fiican ugu muuqdo, dooro sawir leh saamiga dhinacyada oo laba jibbaaran.
Tani waxay noqon kartaa bog ku yaal wiki-ga maxalliga ah, ama bog interwiki ah sida "meta:Event:Wikipedians_unite!"
Ku dar asal cad sawirka marka la isticmaalayo habka mugdiga ah

Haddii sawirkaagu leeyahay asal hufan, waxaa laga yaabaa inuu adkaado in lagu arko habka mugdiga ah. Haddii qoraalka ama astaantu ay madow yihiin, ku darista asal cad waxay ka caawin kartaa inay si muuqata ugu soo baxaan qaab mugdi ah.
communityconfiguration-helppanel-descrip: Habee dejimaha Gudiga Caawinta si ay ula jaanqaadaan baahiyaha bulshadiinna, una qeex ilaha ku jira si ay u caawiyaan una hagaan tafatirayaasha cusub.
communityconfiguration-helppanel-info-te: Gudiga caawinta wuxuu ka shaqayn karaa meel magac kasta, ha ahaato habka akhriska ama habka tafatirka, sida hoos lagu dejiyay. Wuxuu bixiyaa awood lagu raadiyo caawimo, lagu gujiyo xiriirinta caawinta, laguna weydiiyo su'aalo hagayaal ama miiska caawinta. Xiriirinta waxaa loo dejin karaa bogag kasta oo wiki-ga ku jira, laakiin waxaa jira talooyin lagu soo jeediyo Xiriirinta ugu habboon.
communityconfiguration-helppanel-gehelpp: Halkee ayaa su’aalaha ka imanaya Gudiga Caawinta loo diri doonaa?
Halkee ayaa su’aalaha cusub lagu dhigayaa bogga miiska caawinta?
Magacyada meel magac ee lagu naafoyeeyay Gudiga Caawinta labadaba habka akhriska iyo habka tafatirka
Meel magacyada ee Gudiga Caawinta lagu heli karo habka akhriska
Meel magacyada ee lagu darayo raadinta qoraalka furan ee Gudiga Caawinta
Bogga miiska caawinta ee laga soo dhigo su’aalaha ka yimaada Gudiga Caawinta
Bogga loo socdo ee "Fiiri maqaallo caawimo oo dheeraad ah"
communityconfiguration-mentorship-descri: Habee dejimaha hagidda iyo shuruudaha u qalmidda, adigoo sidoo kale hagaajinaya tirada ugu yar ee tafatirrada iyo waqtiyada loogu talagalay hagayaasha iyo ardayda mudan ama lagu ammaano.
communityconfiguration-mentorship-info-t:
Isticmaalayaasha cusub si toos ah ayaa loogu qoondeeyaa hagayaal ku jira liiska [[Special:ManageMentors|hagayaasha]] ee lagu calaamadeeyay “Si otomaatig ah loo qoondeeyo”. Haguhu sidoo kale wuxuu ka beddeli karaa dejintiisa dashboard-ka hagayaasha si uu u qaato ardayda kaliya gacanta, markaasna waxaa lagu calaamadeeyaa “Si gacanta loo qoondeeyo”.

Tirada ugu habboon ee hagayaashu waa: hal hage 500 akoon oo cusub, ugu yaraan 3 hage. Ardaydu sidoo kale waxay heli karaan farriimo dhiirrigelin ah oo ka yimaada tafatirayaal khibrad leh, taas oo kordhin karta sii-haynta isticmaalayaasha cusub.

Qaybta Amaan la gaaryeelay waxay soo bandhigtaa isticmaalayaasha cusub ee mudan ama waxqabadkoodu fiican yahay, si ay hagayaashu u arkaan una dhiirrigeliyaan, taas oo ka caawisa inay dareemaan ka-qaybgal iyo xiriir bulsho.
communityconfiguration-mentorship-gement: Tafatirayaasha buuxiya dhammaan shuruudaha u qalmidda si toos ah ayey ugu qalmaan inay iska diiwaan geliyaan hagayaal

Haddii dejintan aan la calaamadin iyadoo astaamaha hagidda ay shidan yihiin, hagayaasha suurtagalka ah ma awoodi doonaan inay iska diiwaan geliyaan hagid, ilaa ay haystaan xuquuqda “enrollasmentor” ama ay Maamulayaasha ku daraan hagayaal cusub iyagoo adeegsanaya [[Special:ManageMentors]].
Tirada ugu yar ee maalmaha uu isticmaaluhu diiwaangashan yahay si uu isu diiwaangeliyo hage
Tirada ugu yar ee tafatirrada uu isticmaaluhu sameeyay (oo ku jira meel magac kasta) si uu isu diiwaangeliyo hage
communityconfiguration-mentorship-gepers: Tirada maalmaha ee la tixgeliyo marka la qiimeynayo mudnaanta ama ammaanta ardayga
Hagayaashu waxay ka beddeli karaan dejintan akoonkooda gaarka ah ee ku jira dashboard-ka hagayaasha.
Sida caadiga ah, intee jeer (saacado) ayey tahay in hagayaashu helaan xusuusin ku saabsan inay dhiirrigelin u diraan ardayda si guul leh u tafatira?
Hagayaashu waxay ka beddeli karaan dejintan akoonkooda gaarka ah ee ku jira dashboard-ka hagayaasha.
Tirada ugu badan ee tafatirrada uu isticmaaluhu sameyn karo si loogu tixgeliyo inuu yahay mid mudan ama la ammaani karo
Tirada ugu yar ee tafatirrada uu mentee-ku sameeyo si caadi ahaan loogu tixgeliyo inuu yahay mid mudan ama la ammaani karo
Hagayaashu waxay ka beddeli karaan dejintan akoonkooda gaarka ah ee ku jira dashboard-ka hagayaasha.
communityconfiguration-mentorship-gement: Ka saar isticmaalayaasha khibradda leh barnaamijka hagidda
Marka la shido, ardayda si otomaatig ah ayaa looga saaraa barnaamijka hagidda marka ay gaaraan labada xad . Si kastaba ha ahaatee, weli waxay ka heli karaan hage boggooda hore.
communityconfiguration-growthhomepage-ti: Hagidda iyo soo dhaweynta isticmaalayaasha cusub
communityconfiguration-growthhomepage-de: Habbee hagidda iyo soo dhaweynta isticmaalayaasha cusub adigoo adeegsanaya caawimo ka dambeysa diiwaangelinta iyo ogeysiisyada horumarinta heerarka.
communityconfiguration-growthhomepage-in: Bogga cusub ee isticmaalayaasha ([[Special:Homepage]]) wuxuu bixiyaa hagid iyo tilmaamo loogu talagalay dadka akoonka cusub leh. Marka la diiwaangeliyo, haddii qofka cusub muujiyo inuu doonayo inuu abuuro maqaal ama ku daro sawir cusub Wikipedia, waxaa lagu talinayaa inuu marka hore sameeyo tafatir yar si uu u bilaabo, waxaana sidoo kale la siiyaa xiriir hagid dheeraad ah.
communityconfiguration-growthhomepage-ge: Caawinta loo socdo ee xiriirka ku saabsan abuurista maqaal cusub
Bogga loo socdo ee xiriirka ku saabsan sida sawirro loogu daro tafatiraha muuqaalka
Isku day ogeysiiska Tafatirrada la soo jeediyay

Tirada ugu badan ee tafatirrada uu yeelan karo isticmaale cusub si uu u helo ogeysiiskan. Haddii lagu dejiyo 0, isticmaalayaal cusub ma heli doonaan ogeysiiskan. Tirada sare ee la dejiyo, ayay isticmaalayaal cusub oo badan heli doonaan ogeysiiskan. Ogeysiiskan waxaa kaliya loo diraa isticmaalayaasha cusub ee aan weli dhammaystirin tafatirrada la soo jeediyay.

Tirada ugu badan ee tafatirrada la soo jeediyay ee uu isticmaale cusub dhammayn karo si uu ugu qalmo inuu helo ogeysiiskan. Haddii la dejiyo 0, isticmaalayaasha cusub ma heli doonaan ogeysiiskan. Tirada sii kordheysa waxay kordhisaa isticmaalayaasha heli kara ogeysiiskan. Ogeysiiskan waxaa kaliya loo diraa isticmaalayaasha cusub ee hore u dhammaystay ugu yaraan hal tafatir oo la soo jeediyay.
communityconfiguration-growthsuggesteded: Tafatirrada la soo jeediyay
Habee astaanta Tafatirrada la soo jeediyay ee bogga isticmaalayaasha cusub.

Tafatirrada la soo jeediyay waxay ka caawiyaan isticmaalayaasha cusub inay bilaabaan tafatirka. Isticmaalayaasha cusub ee web-ka iyo mobile web-ka waxay ka heli karaan Tafatirrada la soo jeediyay boggooda isticmaalaha cusub. Tafatirrada la soo jeediyay waxaa lagu calaamadeeyaa “Hawsha isticmaalaha cusub”.
Fadlan ogow in cusboonaysiinta foomkan aysan saameyn doonin Tafatirrada la soo jeediyay ee ku jira barnaamijyada Wikipedia ee iOS iyo Android. Si arrintan loogala hadlo, la xiriir kooxda Apps-ka adigoo isticmaalaya [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Talk:Wikimedia_Apps Talk:Wikimedia Apps]. Noocyada qaar ee Hawlaha Isticmaalayaasha Cusub waxaa lagu soo bandhigaa iyada oo loo marayo tuulooyinka dayactir. Maqaallada leh tusmadaas waxaa lagu daraa quudka Tafatirrada la soo jeediyay ee bogga hore. Si aad u aragto inta maqaal ee diyaar u ah nooc kasta oo hawl ah, fiiri [[Special:NewcomerTasksInfo]].
Sanduuqa tusmada

Tusmadaan waxaa loo baahan yahay astaanta hawsha isticmaalayaasha cusub ee [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Growth/Personalized first day/Structured tasks/Add an image|soo jeedinta sawirrada]]. Maqaallada leh tusmadaan laguma soo bandhigi doono hawlaha soo jeedinta sawirrada.
Nuqul saxid
Hawshani waa la joojiyay.
Sixidda nuqulka: tusmooyinka lagu helo maqaallo u baahan sixid nuqul ah, sida hagaajinta higgaadda, naxwaha, iyo calaamadaha qoraalka.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan tusmooyinka halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan qaybaha halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Bogga loo socdo ee lagu barto wax badan oo ku saabsan sixidda nuqulka
Ku dar xiriirro u dhexeeya maqaallada
Hawshani waa la joojiyay.
Xiriirro: tusmada lagu helo maqaallo u baahan xiriirro dheeraad ah.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan tusmooyinka halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan qaybaha halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Bogga loo socdo ee lagu barto wax badan oo ku saabsan ku darista xiriirrada
Raadi tixraacyo
Hawshani waa la joojiyay.
Tixraacyo: tusmada lagu helo maqaallo u baahan tixraacyo dheeraad ah
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan tusmada halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan qaybaha halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Bogga loo socdo ee lagu barto wax badan oo ku saabsan ku darista tixraacyada.
Cusboonaysii maqaallada
Hawsha waa la joojiyay.
Cusboonaysiin: tusmada lagu helo maqaallo u baahan in lagu cusboonaysiiyo macluumaadka hadda jira.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan tusmada halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan qaybaha halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Bogga loo socdo ee lagu barto wax badan oo ku saabsan cusboonaysiinta maqaallada.
Balaadhi maqaallada gaaban
Hawshani waa la joojiyay.
Balaadhin: tusmada lagu helo maqaallo u baahan in la balaadhiyo.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan tusmada halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan qaybaha halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Bogga loo socdo ee lagu barto wax badan oo ku saabsan balaadhinta maqaallada.
Ku dar sawir maqaal aan lahayn sawir (Hawl qaabaysan)
Hawshani waa la joojiyay.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan tusmada halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan qaybaha halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha
Bogga loo socdo ee lagu barto wax badan oo ku saabsan nooca hawsha soo jeedinta sawirrada
Tirada ugu badan ee hawlaha la soo jeediyay ee “Ku dar sawir maqaal aan lahayn sawir” uu isticmaale cusub dhammayn karo maalin kasta
Ku dar sawir qayb ka mid ah maqaal (Hawl qaabaysan)
Hawshani waa la joojiyay.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan tusmada halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan qaybaha halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha
Bogga loo socdo ee lagu barto wax badan oo ku saabsan nooca hawsha soo jeedinta sawirrada
Tirada ugu badan ee hawlaha la soo jeediyay ee “Ku dar sawir maqaal qaybtiisa” uu isticmaale cusub dhammayn karo maalin kasta
Ku dar xiriir (Hawl qaabaysan)
Hawshani waa la joojiyay.
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan tusmada halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha
Maqaallada ay ku jiraan qaybaha halkan lagu qeexay lama tusi doono isticmaalayaasha sida hawlo loogu talagalay noocan hawsha
Bogga loo socdo ee lagu barto wax badan oo ku saabsan nooca hawsha ku darista xiriirrada
Tirada ugu badan ee xiriirrada la muujin karo hawl kasta
Liiska qaybaha laga reebay hawsha ku darista xiriirrada
Tirada ugu badan ee hawlaha la soo jeediyay ee “Ku dar xiriir” uu isticmaale cusub dhammayn karo maalin kasta
Miisaanka maqaallada aan lahayn xiriirro ku filan

Waxay saameyneysaa sida maqaallada aan xiriirrada ku filnayn loo kala hormariyo. Goobtan waxay u baahan tahay boqolley qaab jajab ah, sidaas darteed tiradu waa inay u dhexeysaa 0 iyo 1. Marka aad kordhiso tiradan, waxaa sii kordhaya fursadda in isticmaalayaasha cusub la tuso {{GENDER:|talooyinka}} maqaallada u baahan xiriirro.
Heerka ugu yar ee loo baahan yahay ee qiimeynta xiriirka

Heerka ugu yar ee kalsoonida ee soo jeedinta xiriirrada. Goobtan waxay u baahan tahay boqolley qaab jajab tobanle ah, sidaas darteed lambarku waa inuu u dhexeeyaa 0 iyo 1. Haddii {{GENDER:|aad}} kordhiso lambarka, soo jeedinta loo soo bandhigo isticmaalaha waxay yeelan doonaan suurtagalnimo sare oo ay ku noqdaan kuwo tayo wanaagsan, hase yeeshee tirada soo jeedintu way yaraan doontaa. Haddii aad dhimto lambarka, waxaa jiri doona soo jeedinno badan, laakiin qaarkood waxay noqon karaan kuwo tayadoodu hooseyso.
Jooji soo jeedinta hawlaha “Ku dar xiriir” ee ku saleysan tirada guud ee wax ka beddelka isticmaalayaasha cusub
Maya
Haa, ka dib 5 wax ka beddel oo guud
Haa, ka dib 20 wax ka beddel oo guud
Haa, ka dib 50 wax ka beddel oo guud
Haa, ka dib 75 wax ka beddel oo guud
Haa, ka dib 150 wax ka beddel oo guud
